Hello, is this the Einstein booth? I would like to know more.
Yes, welcome. I am proud to present our oncology network.
What is the highlight of your work?
We have the most advanced cell therapies in Latin America.
Impressive. Are you one of the leading centers?
Yes, we are. It is one of the largest cancer centers worldwide.
That is a great achievement. This is a good opportunity to work together.
I agree. Thank you for visiting our booth.

Welcome to the ASCO congress in Chicago. Please visit the booths in the main hall. Today, the highlight is the session on advanced cell therapies. The audience is very large this year. This is the best opportunity to meet the leading hospitals worldwide. The next presentation starts soon. Thank you, and enjoy the congress.

Good morning. Thank you for visiting our booth. I am proud to present the Einstein oncology network. We are one of the leading cancer centers in Latin America, and we have the most advanced therapies. Our biggest achievement is our new cell therapy program. This is a great opportunity to share our work with a worldwide audience. Thank you.
